steps: Weigh out minimum amount Proteinase K (ProK) %s %s Final Concentration For entire 5 ml For 1.5 ml For 3.0 ml 10 mg/ml 50 mg Proteinase K 15 mg ProK 30 mg ProK Proteinase K Life Technologies Catalog #17916

Add appropriate amount of lysis buffer (from the second 5 ml aliquot) If you used the full 50 mg of ProK for 5 ml of buffer that would be wasteful since you don't need it. For half-plate you'll need about 1.5 mls to have plenty, for a whole plate you'll need 3 mls.
Shake vigorously to dissolve It may foam a little.
Filter-sterilize through 0.2 µm syringe filter Sterile Acrodisc® Syringe Filters with HT Tuffryn® Membrane Contributed by users Catalog #4192
creator: Bonnie Poulos
